title: labichea lanceolata subsp. brevifolia
intro: Labichea lanceolata subsp. brevifolia is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane family. It is a plant used in traditional medicine, known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Labichea lanceolata subsp. brevifolia include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a digestive aid. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
